I want to run only the tests with the Category=Integration trait in this xUnit project using dotnet test.

input.initialPrompt: I want to run only the tests with the Category=Integration trait in this xUnit project using dotnet test.

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Run xUnit tests filtered by Category=Integration

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Run xUnit tests filtered by Category=Integration

data.reasoningText: The user wants to run only tests with Category=Integration trait in their xUnit project. Let me look at the project files to understand the setup, then run the tests with the appropriate filter.

arguments.description: Run xUnit tests filtered by Category=Integration

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-55f0b157101d47c7aaf7d9a099b34b7c && dotnet test --filter \"Category=Integration\" --no-restore 2>&1 | tail -30", "description": "Run xUnit tests filtered by Category=Integration", "initial_wait": 30}
